emails.subject: Texaco 989826
emails.body: Texaco 989826 Bill Moore called this morning and said he sent in a nomination change for the 15th on for meter 989826. He would like to go from 1100 to 1250. The daily meter volumes are ranging for the month from 1164 to 1334 Bill feels the 1250 will be the avg. Let me know what you think Daren. thanks.

emails.subject: Re: Texaco 989826
emails.body: Re: Texaco 989826 Just leave the nom as is in Sitara. We will look at all wellheads next week. D Tom Acton@ENRON 04/14/2000 08:15 AM
